task:
Add the following user snippets for JavaScript (persisted to `~/.config/Code/User/snippets/javascript.json`):

- prefix `clog` — body `console.log($1);` — description `Console log`
- prefix `afn` — body `const $1 = async ($2) => {\n  $3\n};` — description `Async arrow function`
- prefix `imp` — body `import $1 from '$2';` — description `Import module`
- prefix `forin` — body `for (const $1 in $2) {\n  $3\n}` — description `For in loop`
